title: Add a recurring feature in dates calendar
excerpt: Please can we have a recurring dates feature, similar to how we have in standard calendars. This can allow us to set a daily, weekly, monthly, bi monthly, yearly tasks within the project. Workload calculations within Mon…

posts.author: NHS_User1 (Nazneen Bagdadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please can we have a recurring dates feature, similar to how we have in standard calendars. This can allow us to set a daily, weekly, monthly, bi monthly, yearly tasks within the project. Workload calculations within Monday.com will become more and more powerful as there is less risk of negating the tasks.

There have already been similar requests raised. the votes for those have reached a total of 67 votes, which really means its is one of the top votes enhancements that is needed within Monday.com. I am happy to provide a screenshot which shows these similar items.

Please can this be added to your improvements pipeline.

Many thanks.
